name: macOS Dependencies Fail Demo
description: Demonstrates action dependencies skipping in Opservant Spark by failing intentionally.

actions.name: Independent Action (Always Executes but Fails)
actions.description: Intentionally fails after setup to demonstrate dependency skipping; downstream dependent actions should be skipped.
actions.command: echo 'Setting up environment for subsequent actions' | exit 1

actions.name: Dependent Action (Will be skipped)
actions.description: Runs only if action-1-setup succeeds; in this demo it will be skipped because the dependency fails.
actions.command: echo 'This action runs only because its dependency succeeded.'

actions.name: Independent Action (Always Executes)
actions.description: Independent of other actions; executes even if prior actions fail in different dependency chains.
actions.command: echo 'I have no dependencies, so I execute anyway!'
